module.name: no-boolean-return-trap
module.description: Disallow ambiguous boolean-return APIs; prefer predicate naming or richer result types for clearer call sites.

scenarios.name: should allow a predicate function whose name starts with 'is', 'has', or 'can'
scenarios.given: a function named isValid that returns a boolean

scenarios.name: should allow a non-boolean return from an arbitrarily named function
scenarios.given: a function named process that returns a string

scenarios.name: should report a function that returns boolean without a predicate-style name
scenarios.given: a function named execute that returns boolean

scenarios.name: should report an arrow function with a non-predicate name that returns boolean
scenarios.given: a const-assigned arrow function named process returning true or false
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the arrow function
